content: Use Times New Roman, Arial or similar font, at least font size 11, margins (2.0 cm side and 1.5 cm top and bottom), single line spacing.
Overall page limit: 10 pages (excluding headers, abstract, references, and risk mitigation table).
Abstract: Maximum 2000 characters including spaces, written in English, identical to text in the administrative form; should not contain confidential information.
Section 1a: The idea - Breakthrough Innovation potential (max. 3 pages)
Section 1c: Principal Investigator- strategic lead and project management  (max 1 page excluding the risk mitigation table)
Letters of support or intent can be uploaded in .pdf as annexes to the proposal.
cfp_subject: The ERC Proof of Concept Grant supports projects exploring the innovation potential of ERC-funded research, focusing on breakthrough innovation with high-risk/high-gain ideas. Proposals should detail the idea, its potential, approach, methodology, project plan (including objectives, description of work with timescale and resources), and the strategic lead/project management by the Principal Investigator, including risk mitigation strategies.
